nasb.text: Then the Lord said to me, “Out of the north the evil will break forth on all the inhabitants of the land.

esv.text: Then the Lord said to me, “Out of the north disaster shall be let loose upon all the inhabitants of the land.

cnv.text: 耶和華對我說：“必有災禍從北方發出，臨到這地所有的居民。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“不错。因为有灾祸要从北方降临到这地方的一切居民。
